question: Is the image a realistic medium shot photography of an ultra-clean cleanroom?
Does the image feature cold white uniform top lighting?
Is there a stainless steel operating table centered in the frame?
Is the operating table surface covered by a light gray anti-static mat with slight texture?
Is there a laminar flow hood positioned above the operating table?
Is the laminar flow hood's air outlet an entire white grille panel?
Is there a technician standing on the left side of the frame?
Is the left technician wearing a full white cleanroom suit with white gloves?
Is the left technician's face shield transparent and without any markings?
Is the left technician's right hand gripping fine-tipped tweezers?
Are the tweezers pointing toward the center of the table and hovering above a wafer?
Are there exactly two round wafer trays placed side by side in the center of the operating table?
Does the left wafer tray contain exactly one dark gray wafer with a rainbow interference luster?
Does the right wafer tray contain exactly two smaller wafers?
On the right tray, is there one regular dark gray wafer and one metallic blue wafer with interference colors?
Are there two transparent petri dishes placed side by side to the right of the wafer trays?
Is one petri dish covered and empty, while the other has a thin iridescent film with a smooth surface?
Is there a white air blower bulb lying on its side to the left of the wafer trays?
Is the air blower bulb's fine nozzle pointing toward the right of the frame?
Is there a black vacuum pickup pen tool lying flat beside the air blower bulb?
Is the vacuum pickup pen's suction tip pointing toward the wafer trays?
Is there a second technician sitting on a high stool on the right side of the frame?
Is the right technician's posture slightly leaning forward?
Is the right technician's left hand resting on a black stereo microscope base?
Are the microscope eyepieces facing the upper right of the frame?
Is there an illuminated ring fill light next to the microscope forming a uniform white circle?
Is there a robotic arm in standby position at the right rear of the operating table?
Is there a smaller silver pick-and-place module stopped on a track below the robotic arm?
Is there a monitor screen hanging on the wall at the left rear of the frame?
Is the monitor screen displaying a pure cyan interface?
Is there a transparent transfer box at the right foreground edge?
Is the transfer box half-open?
Is there a sealed transparent bag containing a roll of white wiping cloth beside the transfer box?
Is the background wall made of white panels with regular seams and no signage?
Are there exactly two technicians visible in the scene?
Are the hand poses of both technicians physiologically plausible (no extra fingers or distortions)?
